'''dhafotho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:iftar|iftar]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-f-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iftar|iftar]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dhafotho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæfetheth|dhæfetheth]] || [[word:dhæfethej|dhæfethej]] || [[word:dhæfethesh|dhæfethesh]] || [[word:dhæfethe|dhæfethe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhafofothoth|dhafofothoth]] || [[word:dhafofothoj|dhafofothoj]] || [[word:dhafofothosh|dhafofothosh]] || [[word:dhafofotho|dhafofotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhafothoth|dhafothoth]] || [[word:dhafothoj|dhafothoj]] || [[word:dhafothosh|dhafothosh]] || [[word:dhafotho|dhafotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhafofthofth|dhafofthofth]] || [[word:dhafofthofj|dhafofthofj]] || [[word:dhafofthofsh|dhafofthofsh]] || [[word:dhafofthof|dhafofthof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhafothotho|dhafothotho]] || [[word:dhafothojo|dhafothojo]] || [[word:dhafothosho|dhafothosho]] || [[word:dhafothoko|dhafothoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhafothoth|dhafothoth]] || [[word:dhafothoj|dhafothoj]] || [[word:dhafothosh|dhafothosh]] || [[word:dhafotho|dhafotho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhafothothol|dhafothothol]] || [[word:dhafothojol|dhafothojol]] || [[word:dhafothoshol|dhafothoshol]] || [[word:dhafothokol|dhafothokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhafothoothotho|dhafothoothotho]] || [[word:dhafothoojojo|dhafothoojojo]] || [[word:dhafothooshosho|dhafothooshosho]] || [[word:dhafothooko|dhafothooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhafothothon|dhafothothon]] || [[word:dhafothojon|dhafothojon]] || [[word:dhafothoshon|dhafothoshon]] || [[word:dhafothokon|dhafothokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhafothothooro|dhafothothooro]] || [[word:dhafothojooro|dhafothojooro]] || [[word:dhafothoshooro|dhafothoshooro]] || [[word:dhafothokooro|dhafothokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|34122d8}}
